← Back to Toronto/Banff 2025
2025-06-05 Canada

Alberta 2025

While with the family, we flew to Calgary and visited Banff.

Day 1

Visiting the city of Calgary.

Walking tour
Walking tour
The Devonian Gardens at a mall in Calgary where we had lunch.
Visiting Rachel’s Auntie Beth, Uncle Phil, and cousins

Day 2

Beautiful lakes.

Lake Louise
Lake Louise
Rachel accepting a job offer!
Celebrating!
Peyto Lake
Peyto Lake
Peyto Lake
We found snow!

Day 3

Visiting Banff.

Downtown Banff. (Unfortunately?) the only bear we encountered on the trip
The hot springs were a hit!
World Cup qualifiers
Ecuador qualifies!

Day 4

Hiking & Canmore.

Grassi Lakes hike
Grassi Lakes hike
Grassi Lakes hike
yes, that is the true colour of the water
Grassi Lakes hike
Walking around Canmore

Day 5

Drumheller - an area where they’ve discovered many dinosaur bones.

Drumheller museum.
Rachel = ½ dinosaur leg
Drumheller museum
The “hoodoos” - an interesting geographical formation
The “hoodoos” - an interesting geographical formation

Day 6

Visiting Heritage Park in Calgary before heading to the airport.

Giovanny thrilled to find almost the exact model his dad had when he was a kid!
Heritage Park
Wagon ride at Heritage Park
